titleStmt.title: SII 23.475: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 475. (A.R. No. 475 of 1907.) Rishiyūr, Tirutturaippundi Taluk, Tanjavur District Kailāsanātha temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga III: year 25: 1202-03 A.D.

summary.p: The king is given the same epithets as in the above. This records a gift of 160 kuḻi of land tax-free by one Nariyañjikkūttaṉ Vayanāṭṭuvēḷāṉ, a kaṉmi (agent) of Kaḷattūr-Kiḻavar Tirumāgāḷattāṇḍār a kāṇiyāḷaṉ (landlord) of the place. This is said to have comprised 60 kuḻi newly purchased by the donor and 100 kuḻi already granted by him and now consolidated in the document. Piḻiśūr is stated to be in Pāmbuṇi-kūṟṟam, a division of Śuttamali-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ karuvūruṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5Āvatu cuttamalivaḷanāṭṭup pāmpuṇikkūṟṟattup piḻicūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyārukku
Ivvūṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya kaḷattūr kiḻavar tirumākāḷattāṇṭār kaṉmi kaḷil nariyañcik kūttaṉ vayanāṭṭu veḷāneṉ Ivvūṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya kaḷattūr kiḻavan taḷarānilai kākku nāyakaṉ Uyyavantān pakkal nāṉ Innāyaṉārukku tirunantāviḷakkuppuṟa
māka Ivvūril Ittaḷarānilai kākku nāyakaṉ Uyyavantāṉ kāṇiyāy varukiṟa teṟkil teruvil teṟkil ciṟakil kiḻpāṟkellai comanāṉa (ta?)veḷāṉ maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai cuntaracoḻapāṇṭi yavāy kkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai piḷ
ḷaiyār kuṇṭukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum Ākap peruṉāṉ kellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṅkuḻi Aṟupatum Innilattu kku meṟkum peruvitikku kiḻakku Ivvayanāṭṭu veḷāṉ munnāḷil tanta Iṟaiyiliyāka koṇṭu viṭṭa viḷainilaṅ kuḻi nūṟum Āka kuḻi nūṟṟaṟupatum I
nnāyanārukku nāḷoṉṟukkuoru tirunantāviḷakku Eriya Iṟaiyiliyā kac cantirātittavarai Ittiruviḷakkukku Ik kuḻi nūṟṟaṟupatum koṇṭu viṭṭa nariyañcikkūttanāna vayanāṭṭu veḷāṉeṉ In nila ṅkuḻi nūṟṟaṟupatum U
paiyamāka kaikkoṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātitta varai Iṉnilam kaikkoṇṭu Erikkac cammatittom tevakulatilata paṇṭitanum cattiya civapaṇṭitanum Āḷuṭaiyānpaṭṭanum periyān paṭṭanum nampi
paṭṭanum kunikkum pirān paṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivom
Digital edition of SII 23.475 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
